sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current state
seg = current_frame.segmentation
print("All non-black, non-background nodes:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] != 'B':
        print(f"  id={n['id']} color={n['color']} pixels={n['pixels']} boundary={n['boundary'][:8]}...")

# Check if purple cross and gray cross merged
purple_nodes = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'p' and n['pixels'] >= 15]
gray_nodes = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'G' and n['pixels'] >= 10]
print(f"\nPurple crosses: {len(purple_nodes)}")
print(f"Gray crosses: {len(gray_nodes)}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
